Package logic.entity

package logic.entity
Active game entities updated each tick by GamePane.setupGameLoops().

Student is the player; BaseTeacher with its three subclasses is the enemy hierarchy; SpellShot is the elemental projectile fired on SPACE; QuestionMark represents an answerable computer terminal; BulletItem is the ammo pickup.
